reason: Changing the FIPS crypto sub‑policy alters the system's core cryptographic behavior. An unsupported sub‑policy can break a wide range of services, cause application incompatibilities, and may require a reboot to take effect. Because this is a FIPS‑related change, automated remediation carries a high risk of system instability or loss of functionality, so it should be handled manually.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; networking affected; potential service disruption; cryptographic compatibility issues; system boot impact; application failures
